channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: 🔥 MiniMax M2.7 ups the scale and cuts compute with 230B params, 4.3% active per token—long-context, MoE magic, OpenSRC hooks. Read the full bill of materials. https://Blockchain.News/news/minimax-m27-nvidia-ai-workflows-e2e-20260413113017 #AI #NVIDIA #ML

item.title: ATOM eyes a shy rebound: solid support sits at $1.69 as price chops near the 20-day average. Will a break toward $1.82-1.85 unlock the next move?... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260413-atom-price-prediction-targets-185-recovery-by-may-2026 #ATOM #Crypto #PricePrediction

item.title: 🔥 BCH eyes a bounce, but the tape stays tight near key supports—bullish breakout hinges on breaking $429.03 toward $432 and beyond. https://Blockchain.News/news/20260413-price-prediction-bch-bitcoin-cash-eyes-440-recovery-after #crypto #BCH #pricepred
